zh.Brechin, Angus, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯布雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christian de Barclay於大約1345年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯布雷時，她的父親David Barclay53歲，母親Margaret Brechin43歲。她和Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk至少有3個兒子。她去世於1365年在英國蘇格蘭享年21歲。

zh-hans.Brechin, Angus, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯布雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christian de Barclay于大约1345年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯布雷时，她的父亲David Barclay53岁，母亲Margaret Brechin43岁。她和Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk至少有3个儿子。她去世于1365年在英国苏格兰享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barclay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Barkley
meanings: English and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   Barclay  .
Americanized form of German   Berkel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname.

variants.name: Barclift
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Brickley
meanings: English and Irish: metathesized form of   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christian de Barclay was born about 1345, in Brechin, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Barclay, was 53 and her mother, Margaret Brechin, was 43. She had at least 3 sons with Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk. She died in 1365, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christian de Barclay est née environ 1345, à Brechin, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Barclay, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margaret Brechin, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk. Elle est décédée en 1365, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christian de Barclay um 1345 in Brechin, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Barclay 53 und ihre Mutter Margaret Brechin 43. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1365 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian de Barclay è nata il circa 1345 nel Brechin, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David Barclay, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Margaret Brechin, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk. Morì nel 1365, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Christian de Barclayが約1345年にイギリススコットランドアンガスブレチンで生まれた時，父David Barclayは53歳，母Margaret Brechinは43歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilkとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1365年にイギリススコットランドで21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christian de Barclay(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 브레친에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Barclay(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Brechin(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Brechin, Angus, Scotland: Brechin, Aonghas, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian de Barclay nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Brechin, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Barclay, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Brechin, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk. Ela faleceu em 1365, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christian de Barclay родилась около 1345 г. в местности бречин, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Barclay было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Brechin, 43. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk. Она умерла в 1365 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Christian de Barclay nació aproximadamente 1345, en Brechin, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David Barclay, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Margaret Brechin, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Sir Robert Innes 8th of Innes - of that Ilk. Murió en 1365, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años.
